properties.script:
# List all non-standard packages to be imported by your 

# script here (only missing packages will be installed)

from ayx import Package

#Package.installPackages(['pandas','numpy'])
from ayx import Alteryx

import requests

from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

import pandas as pd

import re

import numpy as np



def extract_batting_data(game,series_id, match_id):



    URL = 'https://www.espncricinfo.com/series/indian-premier-league-2023-'+ str(series_id) + game + str(match_id) + '/full-scorecard'

    page = requests.get(URL)

    bs = BeautifulSoup(page.content, 'lxml')



    table_body=bs.find_all('tbody')

    batsmen_df = pd.DataFrame(columns=["Name","Desc","Runs", "Balls", "4s", "6s", "SR", "Team"])

    

    for i, table in enumerate(table_body[0:4:2]):

        rows = table.find_all('tr')

        

        

        for row in rows[::1]:

            

            

            cols=row.find_all('td')

            cols=[x.text.strip() for x in cols]

            

           

            if cols[0] == 'Extras':

                continue

            if len(cols) > 7:

                

                batsmen_df = pd.concat([batsmen_df, pd.DataFrame([pd.Series(

                [re.sub(r"\W+", ' ', cols[0].split("(c)")[0]).strip(), cols[1], 

                cols[2], cols[3], cols[5], cols[6], cols[7], i+1], 

                index=batsmen_df.columns )])], ignore_index=True)

                

            if len(cols) == 1 and len(cols[0]) > 1:

                

                if cols[0][0:11] == "Did not bat":

                     txt = cols[0]

                     dnb = txt.split(": ")

                     

                     dnb2 = dnb[1].split(",\xa0")

                     

                     for cols in dnb2:

                        batsmen_df = pd.concat([batsmen_df, pd.DataFrame([pd.Series(

                        [re.sub(r"\W+", ' ', cols), "", 

                        0, 0, 0, 0, 0, i+1], 

                        index=batsmen_df.columns )])], ignore_index=True)

           

   

    return batsmen_df

def extract_bowling_data(series_id, match_id):



    URL = 'https://www.espncricinfo.com/series/indian-premier-league-2023-'+ str(series_id) + '/sunrisers-hyderabad-vs-kolkata-knight-riders-47th-match-' + str(match_id) + '/full-scorecard'

    page = requests.get(URL)

    bs = BeautifulSoup(page.content, 'lxml')



    table_body=bs.find_all('tbody')

    bowler_df = pd.DataFrame(columns=['Name', 'Overs', 'Maidens', 'Runs', 'Wickets',

                                      'Econ', 'Dots', '4s', '6s', 'Wd', 'Nb','Team'])

    for i, table in enumerate(table_body[1:4:2]):

        rows = table.find_all('tr')

        for row in rows[::1]:

            cols=row.find_all('td')

            cols=[x.text.strip() for x in cols]

            if len(cols[0]) > 50:

                continue

            elif len(cols) >= 11:

                bowler_df = pd.concat([bowler_df, pd.DataFrame([pd.Series([cols[0], cols[1], cols[2], cols[3], cols[4], cols[5], 

                                                    cols[6], cols[7], cols[8], cols[9], cols[10], (i==0)+1], 

                                                   index=bowler_df.columns )])], ignore_index=True)

            

    return(bowler_df)
dat = in0.toPandas()

match_id = dat['MatchID'].iloc[0]

game = dat['GameLink'].iloc[0]

Alteryx.write(extract_batting_data(game, 1345038, match_id),1)
Alteryx.write(extract_bowling_data(1345038, match_id),2)

SELECT
      *,
      ( row_number() OVER (ORDER BY 1) ) + (0)  AS `F1`
    FROM JupyterCode_1
select  CAST((SUBSTRING( variableDesc, (((LENGTH(variableDesc)) - ((LENGTH(variableDesc)) - 9)) + 1), ((LENGTH(variableDesc)) - 9))) AS STRING) as `variableDesc` , *   from Filter_7

select  CAST (`4s` AS FLOAT64) as `4s` ,  CAST (`6s` AS FLOAT64) as `6s` ,  `Run Outs` as `Run Outs` , *   REPLACE( Name as `Name` ,  Team as `Team` ,  CAST (Runs AS FLOAT64) as `Runs` ,  CAST (Balls AS FLOAT64) as `Balls` ,  CAST (SR AS FLOAT64) as `SR` ,  CAST (Overs AS FLOAT64) as `Overs` ,  CAST (Maidens AS FLOAT64) as `Maidens` ,  CAST (Wickets AS FLOAT64) as `Wickets` ,  CAST (Econ AS FLOAT64) as `Econ` ,  CAST (Dots AS FLOAT64) as `Dots` ,  CAST (Wd AS FLOAT64) as `Wd` ,  CAST (Nb AS FLOAT64) as `Nb` ,  Catches as `Catches` ,  F1 as `F1` ) from Sort_41

select  CAST((SUBSTRING( variableDesc, (((LENGTH(variableDesc)) - ((LENGTH(variableDesc)) - 4)) + 1), ((LENGTH(variableDesc)) - 4))) AS STRING) as `variableDesc` ,  '1' as `Stmupings` , *   from Filter_55
